checks.name: receiving queue shows expected-today purchase order
checks.detail: Receiving workspace shows Expected Today (1) and PO-TER1070 in the queue.

checks.name: receiving draft preserves purchase-order context
checks.detail: Draft view shows the PO Reference column, normalized expected-delivery label, and return action.

checks.name: receiving draft links back to purchase-order queue
checks.detail: Show Purchase Order returns to the receiving queue with the proof PO visible.

checks.name: hybrid relationship money summary reflects supplier payables
checks.detail: Money section shows hybrid net position, payable due, and ledger continuity from the confirmed PO.

checks.name: supplier settlement context shows below-range reporting and purchase-order continuity
checks.detail: Supply & Inventory shows payable totals, below-range metrics, latest settlement exception, live batch, and purchase order history.
